metadata.title: ATMOS - Your Personal Productivity Habitat
metadata.description: Build, create, and thrive in your personal productivity habitat

hero.title: Your Personal
hero.description: An open-source platform designed for developers to organize their digital life. Build, create, and thrive in a unified workspace.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to boost your productivity

monorepo.title: Monorepo Architecture
monorepo.description: Built with a modern monorepo structure for seamless scalability and code sharing across applications.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Full i18n support with next-intl, making your applications accessible to users worldwide.

theming.title: Dark/Light Mode
theming.description: Beautiful dark and light themes with seamless transitions, powered by next-themes.

components.title: Shared UI Components
components.description: A comprehensive component library with shadcn/ui, ensuring consistent design across all apps.

typescript.title: Type-Safe
typescript.description: End-to-end TypeScript support with strict type checking for a better developer experience.

performance.title: Blazing Fast
performance.description: Optimized with Turbopack for lightning-fast development and builds.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Join the community and start building your personal productivity habitat today.
